basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Psychiatry, AlIMS, New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi has published the Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Technical Support III position on a project basis. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding a MSC Psychology and relevant experience are eligible to apply. The application process will be active until 29 June 2026 through offline mode, and the walk-in interview is scheduled for 30 June 2026. Candidates can access the notification PDF and application details below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Psychology + PG in Psychology + Person with experience of auditory hallucinations
qualification.details: Graduate degree in Psychology PG in Psychology Person with experience of auditory hallucinations

salary_details.details: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA, as admissible As Per ICMR Guidelines

selection_process: Short listed candidates will be called for interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:www.aiims.edu/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application for the Project Technical Support III position is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification includes a Graduate degree in Psychology, followed by a Post Graduate (PG) degree in Psychology. Additionally, candidates must have experience with auditory hallucinations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support III role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support III position is 40 years. There is no minimum age specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this project-based job?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), as admissible according to ICMR Guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for an interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support III in the Department of Psychiatry, AIIMS, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Department of Psychiatry, AIIMS, New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the specific project this role is associated with?
faq.answer: This role is associated with the AVATAR therapy project, as indicated by the brief description of the position.
